meta.title: VALSYNC — Tactical Companion for Valorant
meta.description: A privacy-first Valorant companion. Track stats, check your store, coordinate your party, and review matches. No ads. No tracking.

hero.heading: Tactical Companion
hero.desc: Track stats, check your store, coordinate your party, and review matches — all in one privacy-first app.

features.heading: Everything you need in one place
features.desc: No alt-tabbing. No ad-laden websites. Every tool, one app.
features.i1_desc: RR, MMR, ACS, K/D, headshot %. Your competitive career on one screen.
features.i2_desc: Check your offers without launching the game. Wishlist alerts when skins appear.
features.i3_desc: Coordinate agents with your team. Manage party visibility and matchmaking.
features.i4_desc: Riot friends with presence. Direct 1:1 chat via XMPP. No third-party service.
features.i5_desc: Agents, weapons, maps, lineups, and patch notes — indexed and searchable.
features.i6_desc: Round-by-round kill timeline. Optional local telemetry capture for deep review.

screenshots.heading: See it in action
screenshots.desc: Screenshots from the current release. No mockups — real app.
screenshots.c1: Dashboard — live stats, rank, RR tracker

steps.heading: Three steps to your readout
steps.desc: No account creation. No email. Just your Riot login.
steps.s1_desc: Install from the Play Store. Log in with your Riot Games account via official OAuth — we never see your password.
steps.s2_desc: Tap once to authorize. Your tokens are stored on-device with Android Keystore AES encryption and never leave your phone.
steps.s3_desc: Stats, store, party, social, wiki, replays. No alt-tabbing. No ads. No one watching.

compare.heading: Why VALSYNC
compare.desc: What you get vs what the ad-supported alternatives quietly trade away.

faq.heading: Questions you’re probably asking
faq.desc: Answers to common questions. If yours isn’t here, reach out via the Contact link in the footer.
faq.q1: Is VALSYNC really free? How do you make money?
faq.a1: We don’t. VALSYNC has no revenue model. No ads, no subscriptions, no data sales, no “premium” tier. It exists because its contributors want a companion app that respects players. If that ever changes, it’ll be open-source and transparent — not a dark-pattern pivot.
faq.q2: Will using this get my Riot account banned?
faq.a2: No. VALSYNC uses Riot Games’ official API and operates within their developer terms. It does not inject, modify, or interact with the game client in any way. You’re reading data you’re authorized to access, through the approved API channel.
faq.q3: Does Riot or anyone else see my data?
faq.a3: Your data travels directly between your device and Riot’s servers. VALSYNC has no intermediate server, no data pipeline, no backend. The only exception is XMPP chat messages, which pass through Riot’s chat infrastructure (the same one the game client uses).
faq.a4: Everything VALSYNC stores — encrypted tokens, local replays, cached game data — is removed when you uninstall. There’s nothing left behind on any server because there is no server. You can also revoke access from your Riot account management page at any time.
faq.q5: Which regions and devices are supported?
faq.a5: All Valorant regions are supported. VALSYNC currently runs on Android 8.0 and above. An iOS version is not currently available — the app is built natively for Android using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.

changelog.heading: What’s new
changelog.v103: Agent plan in party screen. Match replay round timeline. Night Market wishlist alerts. Wiki search index for agents, weapons, and maps.
changelog.v102: Daily Store integration with countdown timers. Friends list with in-game status and map tracking. XMPP direct chat.
changelog.v100: Initial release. Live stats, rank tracker, match history. On-device token encryption. Zero telemetry, zero ads.

privacy.heading: No ads. No tracking. No monetization.
privacy.desc: The single strongest signal VALSYNC sends: nothing is for sale. Your data, your stats, your matches — they stay on your device.
privacy.i1_desc: No banners, no interstitials, no video ads, no ad identifiers. Not now, not ever.
privacy.i2_desc: No crash reporters, no usage analytics, no telemetry phoning home. We don’t know how you use the app, and we don’t want to.
privacy.i3_desc: Your Riot tokens are stored in Android Keystore-backed AES encryption. Replay files stay in app-private local storage.
privacy.i4_desc: Every line is visible. The codebase is organized, tested, and documented — built by people who ship professionally.

footer.disclaimer: VALSYNC is an independent, unofficial companion app and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Riot Games. Valorant and all related marks and assets are trademarks of Riot Games, Inc.
